roa.docketEntryComment: Application and Order RE: Disposal of Exhibits Pursuant to PC 1417, et seq.

Remittitur Received Judgment is Modified TO IMPOSE A COURT SECURITY FEE OF $120 (1465.8 SUBD. (A)(1)); A CRIMINAL CONVICTION ASSESSMENT FEE OF $90 (GOV. CODE, 70373, SUBD. (A)(1); AND A $50 CRIMINAL LABORATORY ANALYSIS FEE (HEALTH & SAF. CODE, 11372.5).  IN ADDITION, LEGESSE IS ORDERED TO PAY THE FOLLOWING PENALTY ASSESSMENTS:  (1) $50 STATE PENALTY ASSESSMENT (1464, SUBD. (A)(1); (2) A $35 ADDITIONAL PENALTY (GOV. CODE, 76000, SUBD. (A)(1)); (3) A $25 COURT CONSTRUCTION PENALTY (GOV. CODE, 70372, SUBD. (A)(1); (4) A $5 PENALTY UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 76104.6; (5) A $20 PENALTY UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 76104.7; AND (6) A $10 SURCHARGE UNDER SECTION 1465.7, SUBDIVISION (A).  AS SO MODIFIED, THE JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED.  THE CLERK OF THE TRIAL COURT IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE AN AMENDED JAIL COMMITMENT ORDER THAT SETS FORTH THE AMOUNT OF AND STATUTORY BASIS FOR EACH FEE AND PENALTY ASSESSMENT AS SET FORTH ABOVE, AND TO SEND A COPY OF THE AMENDED JAIL COMMITMENT ORDER TO THE APPROPRIATE AUTHORITIES.
